elements.panel.classList.add('collapsed');\n408\t            state.panelVisible = false;\n409\t        }\n410\t        if (elements.showBtn) {\n411\t            elements.showBtn.classList.remove('hidden');\n412\t        }\n413\t    }\n414\t\n415\t    function togglePanel() {\n416\t        if (state.panelVisible) {\n417\t            hidePanel();\n418\t        } else {\n419\t            showPanel();\n420\t        }\n421\t    }\n422\t\n423\t    // ============================================\n424\t    // Filter Controls Visibility\n425\t    // ============================================\n426\t    function toggleFilterControls() {\n427\t        state.filterControlsVisible = !state.filterControlsVisible;\n428\t        if (elements.filterControls) {\n429\t            if (state.filterControlsVisible) {\n430\t                elements.filterControls.classList.remove('collapsed');\n431\t            } else {\n432\t                elements.filterControls.classList.add('collapsed');\n433\t            }\n434\t        }\n435\t        if (elements.filterToggleBtn) {\n436\t            elements.filterToggleBtn.classList.toggle('active', state.filterControlsVisible);\n437\t        }\n438\t    }\n439\t\n440\t    // ============================================\n441\t    // Date Range Handling (server-side)\n442\t    // ============================================\n443\t    function handleDateRangeChange(value) {\n444\t        state.filters.dateRange = value;\n445\t\n446\t        if (elements.customDateContainer) {\n447\t            elements.customDateContainer.style.display = value === 'custom' ? 'flex' : 'none';\n448\t        }\n449\t\n450\t        if (value === 'custom') {\n451\t            // Wait for the Apply button\n452\t            return;\n453\t        }\n454\t\n455\t        var now = new Date();\n456\t        state.serverSince = '';\n457\t        state.serverUntil = '';\n458\t\n459\t        switch (value) {\n460\t            case 'today': {\n461\t                var start = new Date(now.getFullYear(), now.getMonth(), now.getDate());\n462\t                state.serverSince = start.toISOString();\n463\t                break;\n464\t            }\n465\t            case '7days':\n466\t                state.serverSince = new Date(now.getTime() - 7 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000).toISOString();\n467\t                break;\n468\t            case '30days':\n469\t                state.serverSince = new Date(now.getTime() - 30 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000).toISOString();\n470\t                break;\n471\t            default:\n472\t                // 'all' — no bounds\n473\t                break;\n474\t        }\n475\t\n476\t        updateActiveFilters();\n477\t        resetAndReload();\n478\t    }\n479\t\n480\t    function applyCustomDateRange() {\n481\t        var fromVal = elements.dateFrom ? elements.dateFrom.value : '';\n482\t        var toVal = elements.dateTo ? elements.dateTo.value : '';\n483\t\n484\t        state.filters.customFrom = fromVal;\n485\t        state.filters.customTo = toVal;\n486\t\n487\t        // Convert date strings (YYYY-MM-DD) to ISO8601\n488\t        if (fromVal) {\n489\t            state.serverSince = new Date(fromVal).toISOString();\n490\t        } else {\n491\t            state.serverSince = '';\n492\t        }\n493\t        if (toVal) {\n494\t            // Include the full day by setting to end-of-day\n495\t            var endOfDay = new Date(toVal);\n496\t            endOfDay.setHours(23, 59, 59, 999);\n497\t            state.serverUntil = endOfDay.toISOString();\n498\t        } else {\n499\t            state.serverUntil = '';\n500\t        }\n501\t\n502\t        updateActiveFilters();\n503\t        resetAndReload();\n504\t    }\n505\t\n506\t    // ============================================\n507\t    // Event Loading\n508\t    // ============================================\n509\t\n510\t    function buildServerParams(cursor) {\n511\t        var params = new URLSearchParams();\n512\t        params.set('limit', CONFIG.initialLoadLimit);\n513\t\n514\t        if (state.serverSince) params.set('since', state.serverSince);\n515\t        if (state.serverUntil) params.set('until', state.serverUntil);\n516\t\n517\t        // Pass the search query to FTS5 when doing a fresh fetch\n518\t        if (state.filters.searchQuery) {\n519\t            params.set('q', state.filters.searchQuery);\n520\t        }\n521\t\n522\t        if (cursor) params.set('before', cursor);\n523\t\n524\t        return params;\n525\t    }\n526\t\n527\t    function resetAndReload() {\n528\t        state.allLoadedEvents = [];\n529\t        state.events = [];\n530\t        state.cursor = null;\n531\t        state.hasMore = false;\n532\t\n533\t        if (elements.eventsContainer) elements.eventsContainer.innerHTML = '';\n534\t        renderLoadMore();\n535\t        updateCountDisplay();\n536\t        loadInitialEvents();\n537\t    }\n538\t\n539\t    function loadInitialEvents() {\n540\t        if (state.loading) return;\n541\t        state.loading = true;\n542\t        updateLoadingState();\n543\t\n544\t        var params = buildServerParams(null);\n545\t\n546\t        fetch('/api/events?' + params.toString())\n547\t            .then(function(res) {\n548\t                if (!res.ok) throw new Error('Failed to fetch events: ' + res.statusText);\n549\t                return res.json();\n550\t            })\n551\t            .then(function(data) {\n552\t                state.allLoadedEvents = data.events || [];\n553\t                state.cursor = data.cursor || null;\n554\t                state.hasMore = data.has_more || false;\n555\t                state.total = data.total_filtered || 0;\n556\t                applyClientFilters();\n557\t                renderLoadMore();\n558\t                updateCountDisplay();\n559\t            })\n560\t            .catch(function(err) {\n561\t                console.error('[SidebarTimeline] Failed to load events:', err);\n562\t            })\n563\t            .finally(function() {\n564\t                state.loading = false;\n565\t                updateLoadingState();\n566\t            });\n567\t    }\n568\t\n569\t    function loadMoreEvents() {\n570\t        if (state.loading || !state.hasMore || !state.cursor) return;\n571\t        state.loading = true;\n572\t        updateLoadingState();\n573\t\n574\t        if (elements.loadMoreBtn) {\n575\t            elements.loadMoreBtn.disabled = true;\n576\t            elements.loadMoreBtn.textContent = 'Loading...';\n577\t        }\n578\t\n579\t        var params = buildServerParams(state.cursor);\n580\t\n581\t        fetch('/api/events?' + params.toString())\n582\t            .then(function(res) {\n583\t                if (!res.ok) throw new Error('Failed to fetch events: ' + res.statusText);\n584\t                return res.json();\n585\t            })\n586\t            .then(function(data) {\n587\t                var newEvents = data.events || [];\n588\t                state.allLoadedEvents = state.allLoadedEvents.concat(newEvents);\n589\t\n590\t                // Trim to memory limit\n591\t                if (state.allLoadedEvents.length > CONFIG.maxEventsInMemory) {\n592\t                    state.allLoadedEvents = state.allLoadedEvents.slice(0, CONFIG.maxEventsInMemory);\n593\t                }\n594\t\n595\t                state.cursor = data.cursor || null;\n596\t                state.hasMore = data.has_more || false;\n597\t                state.total = data.total_filtered || 0;\n598\t\n599\t                applyClientFilters();\n600\t                renderLoadMore();\n601\t                updateCountDisplay();\n602\t            })\n603\t            .catch(function(err) {\n604\t                console.error('[SidebarTimeline] Failed to load more events:', err);\n605\t            })\n606\t            .finally(function() {\n607\t                state.loading = false;\n608\t                updateLoadingState();\n609\t                if (elements.loadMoreBtn) {\n610\t                    elements.loadMoreBtn.disabled = false;\n611\t                    elements.loadMoreBtn.textContent = 'Load more';\n612\t                }\n613\t            });\n614\t    }\n615\t\n616\t    // ============================================\n617\t    // Client-Side Filtering\n618\t    // ============================================\n619\t\n620\t    function eventMatchesFilters(event) {\n621\t        var typeInfo = EVENT_TYPES[event.type] || EVENT_TYPES.system;\n622\t        var category = typeInfo.category || 'system';\n623\t\n624\t        // Category filter\n625\t        if (!state.filters.categories[category]) return false;\n626\t\n627\t        // Person filter\n628\t        if (state.filters.person && event.person !== state.filters.person) return false;\n629\t\n630\t        // Zone filter\n631\t        if (state.filters.zone && event.zone !== state.filters.zone) return false;\n632\t\n633\t        // Text search — fuzzy match on computed description\n634\t        if (state.filters.searchQuery) {\n635\t            var desc = buildEventDescription(event, typeInfo).toLowerCase();\n636\t            var query = state.filters.searchQuery.toLowerCase();\n637\t            if (!fuzzyMatch(desc, query)) return false;\n638\t        }\n639\t\n640\t        return true;\n641\t    }\n642\t\n643\t    /**\n644\t     * Simple fuzzy match: returns true if all characters in query appear\n645\t     * in order within text, or text contains query as a substring.\n646\t     * Uses substring match for short queries (< 4 chars) and sequential\n647\t     * character matching for longer queries.\n648\t     */\n649\t    function fuzzyMatch(text, query) {\n650\t        if (!query) return true;\n651\t        if (text.indexOf(query) !== -1) return true;\n652\t        if (query.length < 4) return false;\n653\t\n654\t        // Sequential character fuzzy match\n655\t        var qi = 0;\n656\t        for (var ti = 0; ti < text.length && qi < query.length; ti++) {\n657\t            if (text[ti] === query[qi]) qi++;\n658\t        }\n659\t        return qi === query.length;\n660\t    }\n661\t\n662\t    function applyClientFilters() {\n663\t        state.events = state.allLoadedEvents.filter(eventMatchesFilters);\n664\t        renderEvents();\n665\t    }\n666\t\n667\t    // ============================================\n668\t    // Active Filters Display\n669\t    // ============================================\n670\t    function updateActiveFilters() {\n671\t        if (!elements.activeFilters || !elements.activeFilterTags) return;\n672\t\n673\t        var tags = [];\n674\t\n675\t        // Disabled categories\n676\t        var allCats = ['presence', 'zones', 'alerts', 'system', 'learning'];\n677\t        var catLabels = { presence: 'Presence', zones: 'Zones', alerts: 'Alerts', system: 'System', learning: 'Learning' };\n678\t        allCats.forEach(function(cat) {\n679\t            if (!state.filters.categories[cat]) {\n680\t                tags.push({ label: catLabels[cat] + ' hidden', key: 'cat:' + cat });\n681\t            }\n682\t        });\n683\t\n684\t        // Person\n685\t        if (state.filters.person) {\n686\t            tags.push({ label: 'Person: ' + state.filters.person, key: 'person' });\n687\t        }\n688\t\n689\t        // Zone\n690\t        if (state.filters.zone) {\n691\t            tags.push({ label: 'Zone: ' + state.filters.zone, key: 'zone' });\n692\t        }\n693\t\n694\t        // Date range\n695\t        var dateLabels = { today: 'Today', '7days': 'Last 7 days', '30days': 'Last 30 days', custom: 'Custom range' };\n696\t        if (state.filters.dateRange !== 'all') {\n697\t            var label = dateLabels[state.filters.dateRange] || state.filters.dateRange;\n698\t            if (state.filters.dateRange === 'custom' && state.filters.customFrom) {\n699\t                label = state.filters.customFrom + ' to ' + (state.filters.customTo || 'now');\n700\t            }\n701\t            tags.push({ label: label, key: 'date' });\n702\t        }\n703\t\n704\t        // Search\n705\t        if (state.filters.searchQuery) {\n706\t            tags.push({ label: 'Search: ' + state.filters.searchQuery, key: 'search' });\n707\t        }\n708\t\n709\t        if (tags.length === 0) {\n710\t            elements.activeFilters.style.display = 'none';\n711\t            return;\n712\t        }\n713\t\n714\t        elements.activeFilters.style.display = 'flex';\n715\t        elements.activeFilterTags.innerHTML = tags.map(function(tag) {\n716\t            return '<span class=\"sidebar-filter-tag\" data-key=\"' + escapeHtml(tag.key) + '\">' +\n717\t                escapeHtml(tag.label) +\n718\t                '<button class=\"sidebar-filter-tag-remove\" title=\"Remove filter\">×</button>' +\n719\t                '</span>';\n720\t        }).join('');\n721\t\n722\t        // Bind remove buttons\n723\t        elements.activeFilterTags.querySelectorAll('.sidebar-filter-tag-remove').forEach(function(btn) {\n724\t            btn.addEventListener('click', function(e) {\n725\t                e.stopPropagation();\n726\t                var key = btn.closest('.sidebar-filter-tag').dataset.key;\n727\t                removeFilter(key);\n728\t            });\n729\t        });\n730\t    }\n731\t\n732\t    function removeFilter(key) {\n733\t        if (key === 'person') {\n734\t            state.filters.person = '';\n735\t            if (elements.personSelect) elements.personSelect.value = '';\n736\t            applyClientFilters();\n737\t        } else if (key === 'zone') {\n738\t            state.filters.zone = '';\n739\t            if (elements.zoneSelect) elements.zoneSelect.value = '';\n740\t            applyClientFilters();\n741\t        } else if (key === 'search') {\n742\t            state.filters.searchQuery = '';\n743\t            if (elements.searchInput) elements.searchInput.value = '';\n744\t            applyClientFilters();\n745\t        } else if (key === 'date') {\n746\t            state.filters.dateRange = 'all';\n747\t            state.filters.customFrom = '';\n748\t            state.filters.customTo = '';\n749\t            state.serverSince = '';\n750\t            state.serverUntil = '';\n751\t            if (elements.dateRangeSelect) elements.dateRangeSelect.value = 'all';\n752\t            if (elements.customDateContainer) elements.customDateContainer.style.display = 'none';\n753\t            resetAndReload();\n754\t        } else if (key.indexOf('cat:') === 0) {\n755\t            var cat = key.substring(4);\n756\t            state.filters.categories[cat] = true;\n757\t            var catEl = document.getElementById('filter-category-' + cat);\n758\t            if (catEl) catEl.checked = true;\n759\t            applyClientFilters();\n760\t        }\n761\t        updateActiveFilters();\n762\t    }\n763\t\n764\t    function clearAllFilters() {\n765\t        state.filters.categories = { presence: true, zones: true, alerts: true, system: false, learning: false };\n766\t        state.filters.person = '';\n767\t        state.filters.zone = '';\n768\t        state.filters.dateRange = 'all';\n769\t        state.filters.customFrom = '';\n770\t        state.filters.customTo = '';\n771\t        state.filters.searchQuery = '';\n772\t        state.serverSince = '';\n773\t        state.serverUntil = '';\n774\t\n775\t        // Reset UI\n776\t        if (elements.categoryPresence) elements.categoryPresence.checked = true;\n777\t        if (elements.categoryZones) elements.categoryZones.checked = true;\n778\t        if (elements.categoryAlerts) elements.categoryAlerts.checked = true;\n779\t        if (elements.categorySystem) elements.categorySystem.checked = false;\n780\t        if (elements.categoryLearning) elements.categoryLearning.checked = false;\n781\t        if (elements.personSelect) elements.personSelect.value = '';\n782\t        if (elements.zoneSelect) elements.zoneSelect.value = '';\n783\t        if (elements.dateRangeSelect) elements.dateRangeSelect.value = 'all';\n784\t        if (elements.searchInput) elements.searchInput.value = '';\n785\t        if (elements.customDateContainer) elements.customDateContainer.style.display = 'none';\n786\t\n787\t        updateActiveFilters();\n788\t        resetAndReload();\n789\t    }\n790\t\n791\t    // ============================================\n792\t    // Virtualization Setup\n793\t    // ============================================\n794\t    function setupVirtualization() {\n795\t        if (!CONFIG.virtualization.enabled || !elements.content) return;\n796\t\n797\t        var observerOptions = {\n798\t            root: elements.content,\n799\t            rootMargin: CONFIG.virtualization.rootMargin,\n800\t            threshold: CONFIG.virtualization.threshold\n801\t        };\n802\t\n803\t        state.virtualization.observer = new IntersectionObserver(function(entries) {\n804\t            handleIntersection(entries);\n805\t        }, observerOptions);\n806\t    }\n807\t\n808\t    function handleIntersection(entries) {\n809\t        entries.forEach(function(entry) {\n810\t            var index = parseInt(entry.target.dataset.index, 10);\n811\t            if (isNaN(index)) return;\n812\t            if (entry.isIntersecting) {\n813\t                state.virtualization.visibleIndices.add(index);\n814\t            } else {\n815\t                state.virtualization.visibleIndices.delete(index);\n816\t            }\n817\t        });\n818\t        updateRenderedRange();\n819\t    }\n820\t\n821\t    function onScroll() {\n822\t        if (!elements.content) return;\n823\t\n824\t        state.virtualization.scrollTop = elements.content.scrollTop;\n825\t\n826\t        var firstIndex = Math.floor(state.virtualization.scrollTop / CONFIG.itemHeight);\n827\t        var visibleCount = Math.ceil(elements.content.clientHeight / CONFIG.itemHeight);\n828\t        var lastIndex = firstIndex + visibleCount;\n829\t\n830\t        state.virtualization.firstVisibleIndex = Math.max(0, firstIndex - CONFIG.virtualization.bufferSize);\n831\t        state.virtualization.lastVisibleIndex = Math.min(state.events.length - 1, lastIndex + CONFIG.virtualization.bufferSize);\n832\t\n833\t        updateRenderedRange();\n834\t    }\n835\t\n836\t    function updateRenderedRange() {\n837\t        if (!state.events.length) return;\n838\t\n839\t        var firstIdx = Math.max(0, state.virtualization.firstVisibleIndex);\n840\t        var lastIdx = Math.min(state.events.length - 1, state.virtualization.lastVisibleIndex);\n841\t\n842\t        var newRenderedIndices = new Set();\n843\t        for (var i = firstIdx; i <= lastIdx; i++) {\n844\t            newRenderedIndices.add(i);\n845\t        }\n846\t\n847\t        var fragment = document.createDocumentFragment();\n848\t        newRenderedIndices.forEach(function(index) {\n849\t            if (!state.virtualization.renderedIndices.has(index)) {\n850\t                var event = state.events[index];\n851\t                if (event) {\n852\t                    var tempDiv = document.createElement('div');\n853\t                    tempDiv.innerHTML = renderEvent(event, false, index);\n854\t                    var newEventEl = tempDiv.firstElementChild;\n855\t                    if (newEventEl) {\n856\t                        newEventEl.dataset.index = index;\n857\t                        fragment.appendChild(newEventEl);\n858\t                    }\n859\t                }\n860\t            }\n861\t        });\n862\t\n863\t        if (fragment.children.length > 0) {\n864\t            elements.eventsContainer.appendChild(fragment);\n865\t            Array.from(fragment.children).forEach(function(item) {\n866\t                bindEventHandlers(item);\n867\t                if (state.virtualization.observer) {\n868\t                    state.virtualization.observer.observe(item);\n869\t                }\n870\t            });\n871\t        }\n872\t\n873\t        state.virtualization.renderedIndices.forEach(function(index) {\n874\t            if (!newRenderedIndices.has(index)) {\n875\t                var item = elements.eventsContainer.querySelector('[data-index=\"' + index + '\"]');\n876\t                if (item) {\n877\t                    if (state.virtualization.observer) {\n878\t                        state.virtualization.observer.unobserve(item);\n879\t                    }\n880\t                    item.remove();\n881\t                }\n882\t            }\n883\t        });\n884\t\n885\t        state.virtualization.renderedIndices = newRenderedIndices;\n886\t        updateSpacers();\n887\t    }\n888\t\n889\t    function updateSpacers() {\n890\t        if (!elements.spacerTop || !elements.spacerBottom) return;\n891\t        var topHeight = state.virtualization.firstVisibleIndex * CONFIG.itemHeight;\n892\t        var bottomHeight = (state.events.length - state.virtualization.lastVisibleIndex - 1) * CONFIG.itemHeight;\n893\t        elements.spacerTop.style.height = Math.max(0, topHeight) + 'px';\n894\t        elements.spacerBottom.style.height = Math.max(0, bottomHeight) + 'px';\n895\t    }\n896\t\n897\t    // ============================================\n898\t    // Rendering\n899\t    // ============================================\n900\t    function renderEvents() {\n901\t        if (!elements.eventsContainer) return;\n902\t\n903\t        if (state.events.length === 0) {\n904\t            elements.eventsContainer.innerHTML = '';\n905\t            if (elements.empty) elements.empty.style.display = 'flex';\n906\t            if (elements.loading) elements.loading.style.display = 'none';\n907\t            updateCountDisplay();\n908\t            return;\n909\t        }\n910\t\n911\t        if (elements.empty) elements.empty.style.display = 'none';\n912\t        if (elements.loading) elements.loading.style.display = 'none';\n913\t\n914\t        // Reset virtualization state on re-render\n915\t        state.virtualization.firstVisibleIndex = 0;\n916\t        state.virtualization.lastVisibleIndex = 0;\n917\t        state.virtualization.renderedIndices = new Set();\n918\t\n919\t        if (CONFIG.virtualization.enabled && state.events.length > CONFIG.maxDOMItems) {\n920\t            renderVirtualized();\n921\t        } else {\n922\t            renderAll();\n923\t        }\n924\t\n925\t        updateCountDisplay();\n926\t    }\n927\t\n928\t    function renderAll() {\n929\t        var html = '';\n930\t        state.events.forEach(function(event, index) {\n931\t            html += renderEvent(event, false, index);\n932\t        });\n933\t        elements.eventsContainer.innerHTML = html;\n934\t\n935\t        Array.from(elements.eventsContainer.children).forEach(function(item) {\n936\t            bindEventHandlers(item);\n937\t        });\n938\t    }\n939\t\n940\t    function renderVirtualized() {\n941\t        elements.eventsContainer.innerHTML = '';\n942\t\n943\t        var containerHeight = elements.content.clientHeight || 400;\n944\t        var visibleCount = Math.ceil(containerHeight / CONFIG.itemHeight);\n945\t        var bufferCount = CONFIG.virtualization.bufferSize;\n946\t\n947\t        state.virtualization.firstVisibleIndex = 0;\n948\t        state.virtualization.lastVisibleIndex = Math.min(state.events.length - 1, visibleCount + bufferCount * 2);\n949\t\n950\t        updateSpacers();\n951\t        updateRenderedRange();\n952\t    }\n953\t\n954\t    function renderEvent(event, isNew, index) {\n955\t        var typeInfo = EVENT_TYPES[event.type] || EVENT_TYPES.system;\n956\t        var timeStr = formatTimestamp(event.timestamp_ms);\n957\t        var description = buildEventDescription(event, typeInfo);\n958\t\n959\t        var severityClass = (event.severity === 'alert' || event.severity === 'critical') ? ' severity-critical' :\n960\t                            (event.severity === 'warning' ? ' severity-warning' : '');\n961\t        var newClass = isNew ? ' new-event' : '';\n962\t\n963\t        var systemEventTypes = ['node_online', 'node_offline', 'ota_update', 'baseline_changed', 'system', 'learning_milestone', 'anomaly_learned'];\n964\t        var isSystemEvent = systemEventTypes.indexOf(event.type) !== -1;\n965\t        var secondaryClass = isSystemEvent ? ' secondary' : '';\n966\t\n967\t        var dataIndex = index !== undefined ? (' data-index=\"' + index + '\"') : '';\n968\t\n969\t        return '<div class=\"sidebar-timeline-event' + severityClass + newClass + secondaryClass + '\"' +\n970\t            ' data-type=\"' + escapeHtml(event.type) + '\"' +\n971\t            ' data-id=\"' + event.id + '\"' +\n972\t            ' data-timestamp=\"' + event.timestamp_ms + '\"' + dataIndex + '>' +\n973\t            '<div class=\"sidebar-timeline-event-icon\">' + typeInfo.icon + '</div>' +\n974\t            '<div class=\"sidebar-timeline-event-content\">' +\n975\t            '<div class=\"sidebar-timeline-event-title\">' + escapeHtml(description) + '</div>' +\n976\t            '<div class=\"sidebar-timeline-event-meta\">' +\n977\t            '<span class=\"sidebar-timeline-event-time\">' + timeStr + '</span>' +\n978\t            '</div>' +\n979\t            '</div>' +\n980\t            '<div class=\"sidebar-timeline-event-actions\">' +\n981\t            '<button class=\"sidebar-timeline-action-btn feedback-positive\"' +\n982\t            ' data-action=\"correct\" title=\"Correct detection\" aria-label=\"Thumbs up\">👍</button>' +\n983\t            '<button class=\"sidebar-timeline-action-btn feedback-negative\"' +\n984\t            ' data-action=\"incorrect\" title=\"Incorrect detection\" aria-label=\"Thumbs down\">👎</button>' +\n985\t            '</div>' +\n986\t            '</div>';\n987\t    }\n988\t\n989\t    function renderLoadMore() {\n990\t        if (!elements.loadMoreContainer) return;\n991\t        elements.loadMoreContainer.style.display = state.hasMore ? 'flex' : 'none';\n992\t        if (elements.loadMoreBtn) {\n993\t            elements.loadMoreBtn.disabled = state.loading;\n994\t            elements.loadMoreBtn.textContent = state.loading ? .catch(function() {\n                // People endpoint may not be available yet — silently skip\n            });\n\n        // Zones\n        fetch('/api/zones')\n            .then(function(res) { return res.ok ? res.json() : null; })\n            .then(function(data) {\n                if (!data || !elements.zoneSelect) return;\n                var zones = Array.isArray(data) ? data : (data.zones || []);\n                zones.forEach(function(z) {\n                    var name = z.name || '';\n                    if (!name) return;\n                    var opt = document.createElement('option');\n                    opt.value = name;\n                    opt.textContent = name;\n                    elements.zoneSelect.appendChild(opt);\n                });\n            })\n            .catch(function() {\n                // Zones endpoint may not be available yet — silently skip\n            });\n    }\n\n    // ============================================\n    // Mode Change Handlers\n    // ============================================\n    function onRouterModeChange() {\n        if (state.panelVisible) {\n            resetAndReload();\n        }\n    }\n\n    // ============================================\n    // Panel Visibility\n    // ============================================\n    function showPanel() {\n        if (elements.panel) {\n            elements.panel.classList.remove('collapsed');\n            state.panelVisible = true;\n        }\n        if (elements.showBtn) {\n            elements.showBtn.classList.add('hidden');\n        }\n    }\n\n    function hidePanel() {\n        if (elements.panel) {\n            elements.panel.classList.add('collapsed');\n            state.panelVisible = false;\n        }\n        if (elements.showBtn) {\n            elements.showBtn.classList.remove('hidden');\n        }\n    }\n\n    function togglePanel() {\n        if (state.panelVisible) {\n            hidePanel();\n        } else {\n            showPanel();\n        }\n    }\n\n    // ============================================\n    // Filter Controls Visibility\n    // ============================================\n    function toggleFilterControls() {\n        state.filterControlsVisible = !state.filterControlsVisible;\n        if (elements.filterControls) {\n            if (state.filterControlsVisible) {\n                elements.filterControls.classList.remove('collapsed');\n            } else {\n                elements.filterControls.classList.add('collapsed');\n            }\n        }\n        if (elements.filterToggleBtn) {\n            elements.filterToggleBtn.classList.toggle('active', state.filterControlsVisible);\n        }\n    }\n\n    // ============================================\n    // Date Range Handling (server-side)\n    // ============================================\n    function handleDateRangeChange(value) {\n        state.filters.dateRange = value;\n\n        if (elements.customDateContainer) {\n            elements.customDateContainer.style.display = value === 'custom' ? 'flex' : 'none';\n        }\n\n        if (value === 'custom') {\n            // Wait for the Apply button\n            return;\n        }\n\n        var now = new Date();\n        state.serverSince = '';\n        state.serverUntil = '';\n\n        switch (value) {\n            case 'today': {\n                var start = new Date(now.getFullYear(), now.getMonth(), now.getDate());\n                state.serverSince = start.toISOString();\n                break;\n            }\n            case '7days':\n                state.serverSince = new Date(now.getTime() - 7 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000).toISOString();\n                break;\n            case '30days':\n                state.serverSince = new Date(now.getTime() - 30 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000).toISOString();\n                break;\n            default:\n                // 'all' — no bounds\n                break;\n        }\n\n        updateActiveFilters();\n        resetAndReload();\n    }\n\n    function applyCustomDateRange() {\n        var fromVal = elements.dateFrom ? elements.dateFrom.value : '';\n        var toVal = elements.dateTo ? elements.dateTo.value : '';\n\n        state.filters.customFrom = fromVal;\n        state.filters.customTo = toVal;\n\n        // Convert date strings (YYYY-MM-DD) to ISO8601\n        if (fromVal) {\n            state.serverSince = new Date(fromVal).toISOString();\n        } else {\n            state.serverSince = '';\n        }\n        if (toVal) {\n            // Include the full day by setting to end-of-day\n            var endOfDay = new Date(toVal);\n            endOfDay.setHours(23, 59, 59, 999);\n            state.serverUntil = endOfDay.toISOString();\n        } else {\n            state.serverUntil = '';\n        }\n\n        updateActiveFilters();\n        resetAndReload();\n    }\n\n    // ============================================\n    // Event Loading\n    // ============================================\n\n    function buildServerParams(cursor) {\n        var params = new URLSearchParams();\n        params.set('limit', CONFIG.initialLoadLimit);\n\n        if (state.serverSince) params.set('since', state.serverSince);\n        if (state.serverUntil) params.set('until', state.serverUntil);\n\n        // Pass the search query to FTS5 when doing a fresh fetch\n        if (state.filters.searchQuery) {\n            params.set('q', state.filters.searchQuery);\n        }\n\n        if (cursor) params.set('before', cursor);\n\n        return params;\n    }\n\n    function resetAndReload() {\n        state.allLoadedEvents = [];\n        state.events = [];\n        state.cursor = null;\n        state.hasMore = false;\n\n        if (elements.eventsContainer) elements.eventsContainer.innerHTML = '';\n        renderLoadMore();\n        updateCountDisplay();\n        loadInitialEvents();\n    }\n\n    function loadInitialEvents() {\n        if (state.loading) return;\n        state.loading = true;\n        updateLoadingState();\n\n        var params = buildServerParams(null);\n\n        fetch('/api/events?' + params.toString())\n            .then(function(res) {\n                if (!res.ok) throw new Error('Failed to fetch events: ' + res.statusText);\n                return res.json();\n            })\n            .then(function(data) {\n                state.allLoadedEvents = data.events || [];\n                state.cursor = data.cursor || null;\n                state.hasMore = data.has_more || false;\n                state.total = data.total_filtered || 0;\n                applyClientFilters();\n                renderLoadMore();\n                updateCountDisplay();\n            })\n            .catch(function(err) {\n                console.error('[SidebarTimeline] Failed to load events:', err);\n            })\n            .finally(function() {\n                state.loading = false;\n                updateLoadingState();\n            });\n    }\n\n    function loadMoreEvents() {\n        if (state.loading || !state.hasMore || !state.cursor) return;\n        state.loading = true;\n        updateLoadingState();\n\n        if (elements.loadMoreBtn) {\n            elements.loadMoreBtn.disabled = true;\n            elements.loadMoreBtn.textContent = 'Loading...';\n        }\n\n        var params = buildServerParams(state.cursor);\n\n        fetch('/api/events?' + params.toString())\n            .then(function(res) {\n                if (!res.ok) throw new Error('Failed to fetch events: ' + res.statusText);\n                return res.json();\n            })\n            .then(function(data) {\n                var newEvents = data.events || [];\n                state.allLoadedEvents = state.allLoadedEvents.concat(newEvents);\n\n                // Trim to memory limit\n                if (state.allLoadedEvents.length > CONFIG.maxEventsInMemory) {\n                    state.allLoadedEvents = state.allLoadedEvents.slice(0, CONFIG.maxEventsInMemory);\n                }\n\n                state.cursor = data.cursor || null;\n                state.hasMore = data.has_more || false;\n                state.total = data.total_filtered || 0;\n\n                applyClientFilters();\n                renderLoadMore();\n                updateCountDisplay();\n            })\n            .catch(function(err) {\n                console.error('[SidebarTimeline] Failed to load more events:', err);\n            })\n            .finally(function() {\n                state.loading = false;\n                updateLoadingState();\n                if (elements.loadMoreBtn) {\n                    elements.loadMoreBtn.disabled = false;\n                    elements.loadMoreBtn.textContent = 'Load more';\n                }\n            });\n    }\n\n    // ============================================\n    // Client-Side Filtering\n    // ============================================\n\n    function eventMatchesFilters(event) {\n        var typeInfo = EVENT_TYPES[event.type] || EVENT_TYPES.system;\n        var category = typeInfo.category || 'system';\n\n        // Category filter\n        if (!state.filters.categories[category]) return false;\n\n        // Person filter\n        if (state.filters.person && event.person !== state.filters.person) return false;\n\n        // Zone filter\n        if (state.filters.zone && event.zone !== state.filters.zone) return false;\n\n        // Text search — fuzzy match on computed description\n        if (state.filters.searchQuery) {\n            var desc = buildEventDescription(event, typeInfo).toLowerCase();\n            var query = state.filters.searchQuery.toLowerCase();\n            if (!fuzzyMatch(desc, query)) return false;\n        }\n\n        return true;\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Simple fuzzy match: returns true if all characters in query appear\n     * in order within text, or text contains query as a substring.\n     * Uses substring match for short queries (< 4 chars) and sequential\n     * character matching for longer queries.\n     */\n    function fuzzyMatch(text, query) {\n        if (!query) return true;\n        if (text.indexOf(query) !== -1) return true;\n        if (query.length < 4) return false;\n\n        // Sequential character fuzzy match\n        var qi = 0;\n        for (var ti = 0; ti < text.length && qi < query.length; ti++) {\n            if (text[ti] === query[qi]) qi++;\n        }\n        return qi === query.length;\n    }\n\n    function applyClientFilters() {\n        state.events = state.allLoadedEvents.filter(eventMatchesFilters);\n        renderEvents();\n    }\n\n    // ============================================\n    // Active Filters Display\n    // ============================================\n    function updateActiveFilters() {\n        if (!elements.activeFilters || !elements.activeFilterTags) return;\n\n        var tags = [];\n\n        // Disabled categories\n        var allCats = ['presence', 'zones', 'alerts', 'system', 'learning'];\n        var catLabels = { presence: 'Presence', zones: 'Zones', alerts: 'Alerts', system: 'System', learning: 'Learning' };\n        allCats.forEach(function(cat) {\n            if (!state.filters.categories[cat]) {\n                tags.push({ label: catLabels[cat] + ' hidden', key: 'cat:' + cat });\n            }\n        });\n\n        // Person\n        if (state.filters.person) {\n            tags.push({ label: 'Person: ' + state.filters.person, key: 'person' });\n        }\n\n        // Zone\n        if (state.filters.zone) {\n            tags.push({ label: 'Zone: ' + state.filters.zone, key: 'zone' });\n        }\n\n        // Date range\n        var dateLabels = { today: 'Today', '7days': 'Last 7 days', '30days': 'Last 30 days', custom: 'Custom range' };\n        if (state.filters.dateRange !== 'all') {\n            var label = dateLabels[state.filters.dateRange] || state.filters.dateRange;\n            if (state.filters.dateRange === 'custom' && state.filters.customFrom) {\n                label = state.filters.customFrom + ' to ' + (state.filters.customTo || 'now');\n            }\n            tags.push({ label: label, key: 'date' });\n        }\n\n        // Search\n        if (state.filters.searchQuery) {\n            tags.push({ label: 'Search: ' + state.filters.searchQuery, key: 'search' });\n        }\n\n        if (tags.length === 0) {\n            elements.activeFilters.style.display = 'none';\n            return;\n        }\n\n        elements.activeFilters.style.display = 'flex';\n        elements.activeFilterTags.innerHTML = tags.map(function(tag) {\n            return '<span class=\"sidebar-filter-tag\" data-key=\"' + escapeHtml(tag.key) + '\">' +\n                escapeHtml(tag.label) +\n                '<button class=\"sidebar-filter-tag-remove\" title=\"Remove filter\">×</button>' +\n                '</span>';\n        }).join('');\n\n        // Bind remove buttons\n        elements.activeFilterTags.querySelectorAll('.sidebar-filter-tag-remove').forEach(function(btn) {\n            btn.addEventListener('click', function(e) {\n                e.stopPropagation();\n                var key = btn.closest('.sidebar-filter-tag').dataset.key;\n                removeFilter(key);\n            });\n        });\n    }\n\n    function removeFilter(key) {\n        if (key === 'person') {\n            state.filters.person = '';\n            if (elements.personSelect) elements.personSelect.value = '';\n            applyClientFilters();\n        } else if (key === 'zone') {\n            state.filters.zone = '';\n            if (elements.zoneSelect) elements.zoneSelect.value = '';\n            applyClientFilters();\n        } else if (key === 'search') {\n            state.filters.searchQuery = '';\n            if (elements.searchInput) elements.searchInput.value = '';\n            applyClientFilters();\n        } else if (key === 'date') {\n            state.filters.dateRange = 'all';\n            state.filters.customFrom = '';\n            state.filters.customTo = '';\n            state.serverSince = '';\n            state.serverUntil = '';\n            if (elements.dateRangeSelect) elements.dateRangeSelect.value = 'all';\n            if (elements.customDateContainer) elements.customDateContainer.style.display = 'none';\n            resetAndReload();\n        } else if (key.indexOf('cat:') === 0) {\n            var cat = key.substring(4);\n            state.filters.categories[cat] = true;\n            var catEl = document.getElementById('filter-category-' + cat);\n            if (catEl) catEl.checked = true;\n            applyClientFilters();\n        }\n        updateActiveFilters();\n    }\n\n    function clearAllFilters() {\n        state.filters.categories = { presence: true, zones: true, alerts: true, system: false, learning: false };\n        state.filters.person = '';\n        state.filters.zone = '';\n        state.filters.dateRange = 'all';\n        state.filters.customFrom = '';\n        state.filters.customTo = '';\n        state.filters.searchQuery = '';\n        state.serverSince = '';\n        state.serverUntil = '';\n\n        // Reset UI\n        if (elements.categoryPresence) elements.categoryPresence.checked = true;\n        if (elements.categoryZones) elements.categoryZones.checked = true;\n        if (elements.categoryAlerts) elements.categoryAlerts.checked = true;\n        if (elements.categorySystem) elements.categorySystem.checked = false;\n        if (elements.categoryLearning) elements.categoryLearning.checked = false;\n        if (elements.personSelect) elements.personSelect.value = '';\n        if (elements.zoneSelect) elements.zoneSelect.value = '';\n        if (elements.dateRangeSelect) elements.dateRangeSelect.value = 'all';\n        if (elements.searchInput) elements.searchInput.value = '';\n        if (elements.customDateContainer) elements.customDateContainer.style.display = 'none';\n\n        updateActiveFilters();\n        resetAndReload();\n    }\n\n    // ============================================\n    // Virtualization Setup\n    // ============================================\n    function setupVirtualization() {\n        if (!CONFIG.virtualization.enabled || !elements.content) return;\n\n        var observerOptions = {\n            root: elements.content,\n            rootMargin: CONFIG.virtualization.rootMargin,\n            threshold: CONFIG.virtualization.threshold\n        };\n\n        state.virtualization.observer = new IntersectionObserver(function(entries) {\n            handleIntersection(entries);\n        }, observerOptions);\n    }\n\n    function handleIntersection(entries) {\n        entries.forEach(function(entry) {\n            var index = parseInt(entry.target.dataset.index, 10);\n            if (isNaN(index)) return;\n            if (entry.isIntersecting) {\n                state.virtualization.visibleIndices.add(index);\n            } else {\n                state.virtualization.visibleIndices.delete(index);\n            }\n        });\n        updateRenderedRange();\n    }\n\n    function onScroll() {\n        if (!elements.content) return;\n\n        state.virtualization.scrollTop = elements.content.scrollTop;\n\n        var firstIndex = Math.floor(state.virtualization.scrollTop / CONFIG.itemHeight);\n        var visibleCount = Math.ceil(elements.content.clientHeight / CONFIG.itemHeight);\n        var lastIndex = firstIndex + visibleCount;\n\n        state.virtualization.firstVisibleIndex = Math.max(0, firstIndex - CONFIG.virtualization.bufferSize);\n        state.virtualization.lastVisibleIndex = Math.min(state.events.length - 1, lastIndex + CONFIG.virtualization.bufferSize);\n\n        updateRenderedRange();\n    }\n\n    function updateRenderedRange() {\n        if (!state.events.length) return;\n\n        var firstIdx = Math.max(0, state.virtualization.firstVisibleIndex);\n        var lastIdx = Math.min(state.events.length - 1, state.virtualization.lastVisibleIndex);\n\n        var newRenderedIndices = new Set();\n        for (var i = firstIdx; i <= lastIdx; i++) {\n            newRenderedIndices.add(i);\n        }\n\n        var fragment = document.createDocumentFragment();\n        newRenderedIndices.forEach(function(index) {\n            if (!state.virtualization.renderedIndices.has(index)) {\n                var event = state.events[index];\n                if (event) {\n                    var tempDiv = document.createElement('div');\n                    tempDiv.innerHTML = renderEvent(event, false, index);\n                    var newEventEl = tempDiv.firstElementChild;\n                    if (newEventEl) {\n                        newEventEl.dataset.index = index;\n                        fragment.appendChild(newEventEl);\n                    }\n                }\n            }\n        });\n\n        if (fragment.children.length > 0) {\n            elements.eventsContainer.appendChild(fragment);\n            Array.from(fragment.children).forEach(function(item) {\n                bindEventHandlers(item);\n                if (state.virtualization.observer) {\n                    state.virtualization.observer.observe(item);\n                }\n            });\n        }\n\n        state.virtualization.renderedIndices.forEach(function(index) {\n            if (!newRenderedIndices.has(index)) {\n                var item = elements.eventsContainer.querySelector('[data-index=\"' + index + '\"]');\n                if (item) {\n                    if (state.virtualization.observer) {\n                        state.virtualization.observer.unobserve(item);\n                    }\n                    item.remove();\n                }\n            }\n        });\n\n        state.virtualization.renderedIndices = newRenderedIndices;\n        updateSpacers();\n    }\n\n    function updateSpacers() {\n        if (!elements.spacerTop || !elements.spacerBottom) return;\n        var topHeight = state.virtualization.firstVisibleIndex * CONFIG.itemHeight;\n        var bottomHeight = (state.events.length - state.virtualization.lastVisibleIndex - 1) * CONFIG.itemHeight;\n        elements.spacerTop.style.height = Math.max(0, topHeight) + 'px';\n        elements.spacerBottom.style.height = Math.max(0, bottomHeight) + 'px';\n    }\n\n    // ============================================\n    // Rendering\n    // ============================================\n    function renderEvents() {\n        if (!elements.eventsContainer) return;\n\n        if (state.events.length === 0) {\n            elements.eventsContainer.innerHTML = '';\n            if (elements.empty) elements.empty.style.display = 'flex';\n            if (elements.loading) elements.loading.style.display = 'none';\n            updateCountDisplay();\n            return;\n        }\n\n        if (elements.empty) elements.empty.style.display = 'none';\n        if (elements.loading) elements.loading.style.display = 'none';\n\n        // Reset virtualization state on re-render\n        state.virtualization.firstVisibleIndex = 0;\n        state.virtualization.lastVisibleIndex = 0;\n        state.virtualization.renderedIndices = new Set();\n\n        if (CONFIG.virtualization.enabled && state.events.length > CONFIG.maxDOMItems) {\n            renderVirtualized();\n        } else {\n            renderAll();\n        }\n\n        updateCountDisplay();\n    }\n\n    function renderAll() {\n        var html = '';\n        state.events.forEach(function(event, index) {\n            html += renderEvent(event, false, index);\n        });\n        elements.eventsContainer.innerHTML = html;\n\n        Array.from(elements.eventsContainer.children).forEach(function(item) {\n            bindEventHandlers(item);\n        });\n    }\n\n    function renderVirtualized() {\n        elements.eventsContainer.innerHTML = '';\n\n        var containerHeight = elements.content.clientHeight || 400;\n        var visibleCount = Math.ceil(containerHeight / CONFIG.itemHeight);\n        var bufferCount = CONFIG.virtualization.bufferSize;\n\n        state.virtualization.firstVisibleIndex = 0;\n        state.virtualization.lastVisibleIndex = Math.min(state.events.length - 1, visibleCount + bufferCount * 2);\n\n        updateSpacers();\n        updateRenderedRange();\n    }\n\n    function renderEvent(event, isNew, index) {\n        var typeInfo = EVENT_TYPES[event.type] || EVENT_TYPES.system;\n        var timeStr = formatTimestamp(event.timestamp_ms);\n        var description = buildEventDescription(event, typeInfo);\n\n        var severityClass = (event.severity === 'alert' || event.severity === 'critical') ? ' severity-critical' :\n                            (event.severity === 'warning' ? ' severity-warning' : '');\n        var newClass = isNew ? ' new-event' : '';\n\n        var systemEventTypes = ['node_online', 'node_offline', 'ota_update', 'baseline_changed', 'system', 'learning_milestone', 'anomaly_learned'];\n        var isSystemEvent = systemEventTypes.indexOf(event.type) !== -1;\n        var secondaryClass = isSystemEvent ? ' secondary' : '';\n\n        var dataIndex = index !== undefined ? (' data-index=\"' + index + '\"') : '';\n\n        return '<div class=\"sidebar-timeline-event' + severityClass + newClass + secondaryClass + '\"' +\n            ' data-type=\"' + escapeHtml(event.type) + '\"' +\n            ' data-id=\"' + event.id + '\"' +\n            ' data-timestamp=\"' + event.timestamp_ms + '\"' + dataIndex + '>' +\n            '<div class=\"sidebar-timeline-event-icon\">' + typeInfo.icon + '</div>' +\n            '<div class=\"sidebar-timeline-event-content\">' +\n            '<div class=\"sidebar-timeline-event-title\">' + escapeHtml(description) + '</div>' +\n            '<div class=\"sidebar-timeline-event-meta\">' +\n            '<span class=\"sidebar-timeline-event-time\">' + timeStr + '</span>' +\n            '</div>' +\n            '</div>' +\n            '<div class=\"sidebar-timeline-event-actions\">' +\n            '<button class=\"sidebar-timeline-action-btn feedback-positive\"' +\n            ' data-action=\"correct\" title=\"Correct detection\" aria-label=\"Thumbs up\">👍</button>' +\n            '<button class=\"sidebar-timeline-action-btn feedback-negative\"' +\n            ' data-action=\"incorrect\" title=\"Incorrect detection\" aria-label=\"Thumbs down\">👎</button>' +\n            '</div>' +\n            '</div>';\n    }\n\n    function renderLoadMore() {\n        if (!elements.loadMoreContainer) return;\n        elements.loadMoreContainer.style.display = state.hasMore ? 'flex' : 'none';\n        if (elements.loadMoreBtn) {\n            elements.loadMoreBtn.disabled = state.loading;\n            elements.loadMoreBtn.textContent = state.loading ? 'Loading...' : 'Load more';\n        }\n    }\n\n    function updateCountDisplay() {\n        if (!elements.count) return;\n        var total = state.allLoadedEvents.length;\n        var showing = state.events.length;\n\n        if (total === 0) {\n            elements.count.style.display = 'none';\n            return;\n        }\n\n        elements.count.style.display = 'block';\n        if (showing < total) {\n            elements.count.textContent = 'Showing ' + showing + ' of ' + total + ' loaded events';\n        } else {\n            elements.count.textContent = total + (state.hasMore ? '+' : '') + ' events';\n        }\n    }\n\n    function buildEventDescription(event, typeInfo) {\n        var detail = {};\n        if (event.detail_json) {\n            try { detail = JSON.parse(event.detail_json); } catch (e) {}\n        }\n\n        var description = typeInfo.description;\n        var replacements = {\n            '{person}': event.person || detail.person || 'Someone',\n            '{zone}': event.zone || detail.zone || 'the area',\n            '{from_zone}': detail.from_zone || 'previous zone',\n            '{to_zone}': detail.to_zone || 'next zone',\n            '{node}': detail.node || 'a node',\n            '{version}': detail.version || 'latest',\n            '{link}': detail.link || 'a link',\n            '{description}': detail.description || 'activity detected',\n            '{duration}': detail.duration || 'a while'\n        };\n\n        for (var placeholder in replacements) {\n            description = description.replace(placeholder, replacements[placeholder]);\n        }\n\n        return description;\n    }\n\n    function formatTimestamp(ms) {\n        var date = new Date(ms);\n        var now = new Date();\n        var isToday = date.toDateString() === now.toDateString();\n        var time = date.toLocaleTimeString([], { hour: '2-digit', minute: '2-digit' });\n        return isToday ? time : (date.toLocaleDateString() + ' ' + time);\n    }\n\n    function escapeHtml(str) {\n        if (!str) return '';\n        return String(str)\n            .replace(/&/g, '&amp;')\n            .replace(/</g, '&lt;')\n            .replace(/>/g, '&gt;')\n            .replace(/\"/g, '&quot;');\n    }\n\n    // ============================================\n    // Event Handlers\n    // ============================================\n    function bindEventHandlers(eventEl) {\n        eventEl.querySelectorAll('.sidebar-timeline-action-btn').forEach(function(btn) {\n            btn.addEventListener('click', function(e) {\n                e.stopPropagation();\n                var action = btn.dataset.action;\n                var eventId = eventEl.dataset.id;\n                handleFeedback(eventId, action, eventEl);\n            });\n        });\n\n        eventEl.addEventListener('click', function() {\n            var timestamp = parseInt(this.dataset.timestamp, 10);\n            handleSeek(timestamp, this);\n        });\n    }\n\n    function handleFeedback(eventId, action, eventElement) {\n        var correct = action === 'correct';\n\n        if (window.Feedback) {\n            var event = state.allLoadedEvents.find(function(e) { return String(e.id) === String(eventId); });\n            if (event) {\n                var detail = {};\n                try { detail = event.detail_json ? JSON.parse(event.detail_json) : {}; } catch (e) {}\n\n                Feedback.sendFeedback(eventId, event.type, correct ? 'TRUE_POSITIVE' : 'FALSE_POSITIVE', detail);\n\n                eventElement.querySelectorAll('.sidebar-timeline-action-btn').forEach(function(btn) {\n                    if (btn.dataset.action === action) {\n                        btn.classList.add('active');\n                        setTimeout(function() { btn.classList.remove('active'); }, 2000);\n                    }\n                });\n\n                if (window.SpaxelApp && SpaxelApp.showToast) {\n                    SpaxelApp.showToast(correct ? 'Thanks for the feedback!' : 'Thanks — I\\'ll adjust my detection.', 'success');\n                }\n\n                if (!correct) {\n                    eventElement.classList.add('feedback-dismissed');\n                }\n            }\n        } else {\n            fetch('/api/feedback', {\n                method: 'POST',\n                headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },\n                body: JSON.stringify({ type: correct ? 'correct' : 'incorrect', event_id: parseInt(eventId, 10) })\n            })\n                .then(function(res) { if (!res.ok) throw new Error('Feedback failed'); })\n                .then(function() {\n                    eventElement.querySelectorAll('.sidebar-timeline-action-btn').forEach(function(btn) {\n                        if (btn.dataset.action === action) {\n                            btn.classList.add('active');\n                            setTimeout(function() { btn.classList.remove('active'); }, 2000);\n                        }\n                    });\n                    if (window.SpaxelApp && SpaxelApp.showToast) {\n                        SpaxelApp.showToast(correct ? 'Thanks for the feedback!' : 'Thanks — I\\'ll adjust my detection.', 'success');\n                    }\n                    if (!correct) eventElement.classList.add('feedback-dismissed');\n                })\n                .catch(function(err) { console.error('[SidebarTimeline] Feedback failed:', err); });\n        }\n    }\n\n    function handleSeek(timestamp, eventEl) {\n        if (!timestamp || timestamp <= 0) return;\n\n        clearSelectedEvent();\n        if (eventEl) {\n            state.selectedEventId = eventEl.dataset.id;\n            eventEl.classList.add('selected');\n        }\n\n        if (window.SpaxelReplay) {\n            SpaxelReplay.jumpToTime(timestamp).then(function() {\n                updateNowReplayingChip(true, timestamp);\n                if (window.SpaxelTimeline && SpaxelTimeline.clearSelection) {\n                    SpaxelTimeline.clearSelection();\n                }\n            }).catch(function(err) {\n                console.error('[SidebarTimeline] Jump-to-time failed:', err);\n                if (window.SpaxelApp && SpaxelApp.showToast) {\n                    SpaxelApp.showToast('Failed to jump to time', 'error');\n                }\n            });\n        } else if (window.SpaxelRouter) {\n            SpaxelRouter.navigate('timeline');\n        }\n    }\n\n    function clearSelectedEvent() {\n        if (state.selectedEventId) {\n            var prev = elements.eventsContainer\n                ? elements.eventsContainer.querySelector('.sidebar-timeline-event.selected')\n                : null;\n            if (prev) prev.classList.remove('selected');\n            state.selectedEventId = null;\n        }\n    }\n\n    function updateNowReplayingChip(visible, timestampMs) {\n        var chip = document.getElementById('now-replaying-chip');\n        if (!chip) {\n            var header = document.querySelector('.sidebar-panel-header');\n            if (!header) return;\n            chip = document.createElement('span');\n            chip.id = 'now-replaying-chip';\n            chip.className = 'now-replaying-chip';\n            header.appendChild(chip);\n        }\n        if (visible && timestampMs) {\n            var date = new Date(timestampMs);\n            var time = date.toLocaleTimeString([], { hour: '2-digit', minute: '2-digit', second: '2-digit' });\n            chip.textContent = 'Now replaying ' + time;\n            chip.style.display = 'inline-flex';\n        } else {\n            chip.style.display = 'none';\n        }\n    }\n\n    // ============================================\n    // WebSocket Message Handler\n    // ============================================\n    function handleWebSocketMessage(msg) {\n        if (msg.type === 'event') {\n            handleNewEvent(msg.event);\n        }\n    }\n\n    function handleNewEvent(event) {\n        var normalizedEvent = {\n            id: event.id || event.timestamp_ms || Date.now(),\n            timestamp_ms: event.timestamp_ms || event.ts || Date.now(),\n            type: event.type || event.kind || 'system',\n            zone: event.zone || '',\n            person: event.person || event.person_name || '',\n            blob_id: event.blob_id || event.blobID || 0,\n            detail_json: event.detail_json || '',\n            severity: event.severity || 'info'\n        };\n\n        // Only add if within the current server-side date range\n        if (state.serverSince) {\n            var sinceMs = new Date(state.serverSince).getTime();\n            if (normalizedEvent.timestamp_ms < sinceMs) return;\n        }\n        if (state.serverUntil) {\n            var untilMs = new Date(state.serverUntil).getTime();\n            if (normalizedEvent.timestamp_ms > untilMs) return;\n        }\n\n        state.allLoadedEvents.unshift(normalizedEvent);\n\n        if (state.allLoadedEvents.length > CONFIG.maxEventsInMemory) {\n            state.allLoadedEvents = state.allLoadedEvents.slice(0, CONFIG.maxEventsInMemory);\n        }\n\n        if (state.panelVisible && eventMatchesFilters(normalizedEvent)) {\n            state.events.unshift(normalizedEvent);\n            if (state.events.length > CONFIG.maxEventsInMemory) {\n                state.events = state.events.slice(0, CONFIG.maxEventsInMemory);\n            }\n            renderEvents();\n            updateCountDisplay();\n        }\n    }\n\n    // ============================================\n    // UI Updates\n    // ============================================\n    function updateLoadingState() {\n        if (!elements.loading) return;\n        elements.loading.style.display = state.loading ? 'flex' : 'none';\n    }\n\n    // ============================================\n    // Public API\n    // ============================================\n    var SidebarTimeline = {\n        init: init,\n        show: showPanel,\n        hide: hidePanel,\n        toggle: togglePanel,\n        refresh: resetAndReload,\n        isVisible: function() { return state.panelVisible; },\n        clearSelection: clearSelectedEvent,\n        hideNowReplayingChip: function() { updateNowReplayingChip(false); }\n    };\n\n    if (document.readyState === 'loading') {\n        document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', init);\n    } else {\n        init();\n    }\n\n    window.SpaxelSidebarTimeline = SidebarTimeline;\n})();\n","numLines":1260,"startLine":1,"totalLines":1260}}}

        });\n\n            return new Promise(function(resolve) {\n                setTimeout(function() {\n                    const eventEl =            setTimeout(function() {\n                        expect(global.Feedback.sendFeedback).toHaveBeenCalledWith(\n                            '123',\n                            'detection',\n                            'TRUE_POSITIVE',\n                            expect.anything()\n                        );\n                        expect(global.SpaxelApp.showToast).toHaveBeenCalledWith(\n    }, 150);\n            });\n        });\n\n        test('thumbs-down button delegates to feedback module', function() {\n            SidebarTimeline.show();\n            SidebarTimeline.refresh();\n\n            // Mock feedback API response\n            global.fetch.mockImplementationOnce(function() {\n                return Promise.resolve({\n                    ok: true,\n                    json: function() {\n                        return Promise.resolve({ ok: true });\n                    }\n                });\n            });\n\n            return new {\n            // Create a large array of events\n            const largeEventList = [];\n            for (let i = 0; i < 100; i++) {\n                largeEventList.push({\n                    id: i,\n                    timestamp_ms: Date.now() - (i * 60000), // 1 minute apart\n                    type: i % 2 === 0 ? 'detection' : 'zone_entry',\n                    zone: ['Kitchen', 'Living Room', 'Bedroom'][i % 3],\n                    person: ['Alice', 'Bob', 'Charlie'][i % 3],\n                    severity: 'info'\n                });\n            }\n\n            global.fetch.mockImplementation(function() {\n                return Promise.resolve({\n                    ok: true,\n                    json: function() {\n                        return Promise.resolve({\n                            events: largeEventList,\n                            cursor: null,\n                            total_filtered: 100\n                        });\n                    }\n                });\n            });\n\n            SidebarTimeline.refresh();\n\n            return new Promise(function(resolve) {\n                setTimeout(function() {\n                    // Check that events were rendered\n                    const renderedEvents = expect(renderedEvents.length).toBeLessThanOrEqual(100);\n\n                    resolve();\n                }, 200);\n            });\n        });\n    });\n\n    // ============================================\n    // Tap-to-Jump Time-Travel Tests\n    // ============================================\n    describe('Tap-to-Jump Time-Travel', function() {\n        var mockJumpToTime;\n        var routerModeChangeCallback = null;\n\n        beforeEach(function() {\n            mockJumpToTime = jest.fn(function() {\n                return Promise.resolve({\n                    session_id: 'test-session-1',\n                    timestamp_ms: 1710519800000,\n                    from_ms: 1710519795000,\n                    to_ms: 1710519805000,\n                    state: 'paused'\n                });\n            });\n            window.SpaxelReplay = {\n                jumpToTime: mockJumpToTime,\n                isReplayMode: jest.fn(function() { return false; })\n            };\n\n            // Capture router mode change callback via mockImplementation\n            routerModeChangeCallback = null;\n            global.SpaxelRouter.onModeChange.mockImplementation(function(cb) {\n                routerModeChangeCallback = cb;\n            });\n\n            global.fetch.mockImplementation(function() {\n                return Promise.resolve({\n                    ok: true,\n                    json: function() {\n                        return Promise.resolve({\n                            events: [\n                                {\n                                    id: 100,\n                                    timestamp_ms: 1710519800000,\n                                    type: 'zone_entry',\n                                    zone: 'Kitchen',\n                                    person: 'Alice',\n                                    severity: 'info'\n                                },\n                                {\n                                    id: 200,\n                                    timestamp_ms: 1710519860000,\n                                    type: 'zone_exit',\n                                    zone: 'Kitchen',\n                                    person: 'Alice',\n                                    severity: 'info'\n                                }\n                            ],\n                            cursor: null,\n                            total_filtered: 2\n                        });\n                    }\n                });\n            });\n        });\n\n        afterEach(function() {\n            delete window.SpaxelReplay;\n        });\n\n        test('clicking event calls jumpToTime with event timestamp', function() {\n            SidebarTimeline.show();\n            SidebarTimeline.refresh();\n\n            return new Promise(function(resolve) {\n                setTimeout(function() {\n                    var eventEl = mockElements.eventsContainer.querySelector('[data-id=\"100\"]');\n                    expect(eventEl).toBeTruthy();\n\n                    eventEl.click();\n\n                    expect(mockJumpToTime).toHaveBeenCalledTimes(1);\n                    expect(mockJumpToTime).toHaveBeenCalledWith(1710519800000);\n                    resolve();\n                }, 150);\n            });\n        });\n\n        test('clicking different events emits correct timestamps', function() {\n            SidebarTimeline.show();\n            SidebarTimeline.refresh();\n\n            return new Promise(function(resolve) {\n                setTimeout(function() {\n                    var first = mockElements.eventsContainer.querySelector('[data-id=\"100\"]');\n                    var second = mockElements.eventsContainer.querySelector('[data-id=\"200\"]');\n                    expect(first).toBeTruthy();\n                    expect(second).toBeTruthy();\n\n                    first.click();\n                    expect(mockJumpToTime).toHaveBeenCalledWith(1710519800000);\n\n                    second.click();\n                    expect(mockJumpToTime).toHaveBeenCalledWith(1710519860000);\n\n                    expect(mockJumpToTime).toHaveBeenCalledTimes(2);\n                    resolve();\n                }, 150);\n            });\n        });\n\n        test('selected event highlights with selected class', function() {\n            SidebarTimeline.show();\n            SidebarTimeline.refresh();\n\n            return new Promise(function(resolve) {\n                setTimeout(function() {\n                    var eventEl = mockElements.eventsContainer.querySelector('[data-id=\"100\"]');\n                    expect(eventEl).toBeTruthy();\n                    expect(eventEl.classList.contains('selected')).toBe(false);\n\n                    eventEl.click();\n\n                    // Wait for async handleSeek\n                    setTimeout(function() {\n                        expect(eventEl.classList.contains('selected')).toBe(true);\n                        resolve();\n                    }, 50);\n                }, 150);\n            });\n        });\n\n        test('clicking new event clears previous selection', function() {\n            SidebarTimeline.show();\n            SidebarTimeline.refresh();\n\n            return new Promise(function(resolve) {\n                setTimeout(function() {\n                    var first = mockElements.eventsContainer.querySelector('[data-id=\"100\"]');\n                    var second = mockElements.eventsContainer.querySelector('[data-id=\"200\"]');\n\n                    first.click();\n                    setTimeout(function() {\n                        expect(first.classList.contains('selected')).toBe(true);\n                        expect(second.classList.contains('selected')).toBe(false);\n\n                        second.click();\n                        setTimeout(function() {\n                            expect(first.classList.contains('selected')).toBe(false);\n                            expect(second.classList.contains('selected')).toBe(true);\n                            resolve();\n                        }, 50);\n                    }, 50);\n                }, 150);\n            });\n        });\n\n        test('Now replaying chip appears after jump', function() {\n            SidebarTimeline.show();\n            SidebarTimeline.refresh();\n\n            return new Promise(function(resolve) {\n                setTimeout(function() {\n                    var eventEl = mockElements.eventsContainer.querySelector('[data-id=\"100\"]');\n                    eventEl.click();\n\n                    // Wait for jumpToTime promise to resolve\n                    setTimeout(function() {\n                        var chip = document.getElementById('now-replaying-chip');\n                        expect(chip).toBeTruthy();\n                        expect(chip.style.display).not.toBe('none');\n                        expect(chip.textContent).toContain('Now replaying');\n                        resolve();\n                    }, 100);\n                }, 150);\n            });\n        });\n\n        test('hideNowReplayingChip hides the chip', function() {\n            SidebarTimeline.show();\n            SidebarTimeline.refresh();\n\n            return new Promise(function(resolve) {\n                setTimeout(function() {\n                    var eventEl = mockElements.eventsContainer.querySelector('[data-id=\"100\"]');\n                    eventEl.click();\n\n                    setTimeout(function() {\n                        var chip = document.getElementById('now-replaying-chip');\n                        expect(chip).toBeTruthy();\n\n                        SidebarTimeline.hideNowReplayingChip();\n                        expect(chip.style.display).toBe('none');\n                        resolve();\n                    }, 100);\n                }, 150);\n            });\n        });\n\n        test('clearSelection removes selected class from event', function() {\n            SidebarTimeline.show();\n            SidebarTimeline.refresh();\n\n            return new Promise(function(resolve) {\n                setTimeout(function() {\n                    var eventEl = mockElements.eventsContainer.querySelector('[data-id=\"100\"]');\n                    eventEl.click();\n\n                    setTimeout(function() {\n                        expect(eventEl.classList.contains('selected')).toBe(true);\n                        SidebarTimeline.clearSelection();\n                        expect(eventEl.classList.contains('selected')).toBe(false);\n                        resolve();\n                    }, 50);\n                }, 150);\n            });\n        });\n\n        test('without SpaxelReplay navigates to timeline view', function() {\n            // Remove SpaxelReplay to simulate it not being available\n            delete window.SpaxelReplay;\n\n            //         });\n\n            return new Promise(function(resolve) {\n                setTimeout(function() {\n                    const eventEl =            setTimeout(function() {\n                        expect(global.Feedback.sendFeedback).toHaveBeenCalledWith(\n                            '123',\n                            'detection',\n                            'TRUE_POSITIVE',\n                            expect.anything()\n                        );\n                        expect(global.SpaxelApp.showToast).toHaveBeenCalledWith(\n    }, 150);\n            });\n        });\n\n        test('thumbs-down button delegates to feedback module', function() {\n            SidebarTimeline.show();\n            SidebarTimeline.refresh();\n\n            // Mock feedback API response\n            global.fetch.mockImplementationOnce(function() {\n                return Promise.resolve({\n                    ok: true,\n                    json: function() {\n                        return Promise.resolve({ ok: true });\n                    }\n                });\n            });\n\n            return new {\n            // Create a large array of events\n            const largeEventList = [];\n            for (let i = 0; i < 100; i++) {\n                largeEventList.push({\n                    id: i,\n                    timestamp_ms: Date.now() - (i * 60000), // 1 minute apart\n                    type: i % 2 === 0 ? 'detection' : 'zone_entry',\n                    zone: ['Kitchen', 'Living Room', 'Bedroom'][i % 3],\n                    person: ['Alice', 'Bob', 'Charlie'][i % 3],\n                    severity: 'info'\n                });\n            }\n\n            global.fetch.mockImplementation(function() {\n                return Promise.resolve({\n                    ok: true,\n                    json: function() {\n                        return Promise.resolve({\n                            events: largeEventList,\n                            cursor: null,\n                            total_filtered: 100\n                        });\n                    }\n                });\n            });\n\n            SidebarTimeline.refresh();\n\n            return new Promise(function(resolve) {\n                setTimeout(function() {\n                    // Check that events were rendered\n                    const renderedEvents = expect(renderedEvents.length).toBeLessThanOrEqual(100);\n\n                    resolve();\n                }, 200);\n            });\n        });\n    });\n\n    //
