============================================\n    // Tap-to-Jump Time-Travel Tests\n    // ============================================\n    describe('Tap-to-Jump Time-Travel', function() {\n        var mockJumpToTime;\n        var routerModeChangeCallback = null;\n\n        beforeEach(function() {\n            mockJumpToTime = jest.fn(function() {\n                return Promise.resolve({\n                    session_id: 'test-session-1',\n                    timestamp_ms: 1710519800000,\n                    from_ms: 1710519795000,\n                    to_ms: 1710519805000,\n                    state: 'paused'\n                });\n            });\n            window.SpaxelReplay = {\n                jumpToTime: mockJumpToTime,\n                isReplayMode: jest.fn(function() { return false; })\n            };\n\n            // Capture router mode change callback via mockImplementation\n            routerModeChangeCallback = null;\n            global.SpaxelRouter.onModeChange.mockImplementation(function(cb) {\n                routerModeChangeCallback = cb;\n            });\n\n            global.fetch.mockImplementation(function() {\n                return Promise.resolve({\n                    ok: true,\n                    json: function() {\n                        return Promise.resolve({\n                            events: [\n                                {\n                                    id: 100,\n                                    timestamp_ms: 1710519800000,\n                                    type: 'zone_entry',\n                                    zone: 'Kitchen',\n                                    person: 'Alice',\n                                    severity: 'info'\n                                },\n                                {\n                                    id: 200,\n                                    timestamp_ms: 1710519860000,\n                                    type: 'zone_exit',\n                                    zone: 'Kitchen',\n                                    person: 'Alice',\n                                    severity: 'info'\n                                }\n                            ],\n                            cursor: null,\n                            total_filtered: 2\n                        });\n                    }\n                });\n            });\n        });\n\n        afterEach(function() {\n            delete window.SpaxelReplay;\n        });\n\n        test('clicking event calls jumpToTime with event timestamp', function() {\n            SidebarTimeline.show();\n            SidebarTimeline.refresh();\n\n            return new Promise(function(resolve) {\n                setTimeout(function() {\n                    var eventEl = mockElements.eventsContainer.querySelector('[data-id=\"100\"]');\n                    expect(eventEl).toBeTruthy();\n\n                    eventEl.click();\n\n                    expect(mockJumpToTime).toHaveBeenCalledTimes(1);\n                    expect(mockJumpToTime).toHaveBeenCalledWith(1710519800000);\n                    resolve();\n                }, 150);\n            });\n        });\n\n        test('clicking different events emits correct timestamps', function() {\n            SidebarTimeline.show();\n            SidebarTimeline.refresh();\n\n            return new Promise(function(resolve) {\n                setTimeout(function() {\n                    var first = mockElements.eventsContainer.querySelector('[data-id=\"100\"]');\n                    var second = mockElements.eventsContainer.querySelector('[data-id=\"200\"]');\n                    expect(first).toBeTruthy();\n                    expect(second).toBeTruthy();\n\n                    first.click();\n                    expect(mockJumpToTime).toHaveBeenCalledWith(1710519800000);\n\n                    second.click();\n                    expect(mockJumpToTime).toHaveBeenCalledWith(1710519860000);\n\n                    expect(mockJumpToTime).toHaveBeenCalledTimes(2);\n                    resolve();\n                }, 150);\n            });\n        });\n\n        test('selected event highlights with selected class', function() {\n            SidebarTimeline.show();\n            SidebarTimeline.refresh();\n\n            return new Promise(function(resolve) {\n                setTimeout(function() {\n                    var eventEl = mockElements.eventsContainer.querySelector('[data-id=\"100\"]');\n                    expect(eventEl).toBeTruthy();\n                    expect(eventEl.classList.contains('selected')).toBe(false);\n\n                    eventEl.click();\n\n                    // Wait for async handleSeek\n                    setTimeout(function() {\n                        expect(eventEl.classList.contains('selected')).toBe(true);\n                        resolve();\n                    }, 50);\n                }, 150);\n            });\n        });\n\n        test('clicking new event clears previous selection', function() {\n            SidebarTimeline.show();\n            SidebarTimeline.refresh();\n\n            return new Promise(function(resolve) {\n                setTimeout(function() {\n                    var first = mockElements.eventsContainer.querySelector('[data-id=\"100\"]');\n                    var second = mockElements.eventsContainer.querySelector('[data-id=\"200\"]');\n\n                    first.click();\n                    setTimeout(function() {\n                        expect(first.classList.contains('selected')).toBe(true);\n                        expect(second.classList.contains('selected')).toBe(false);\n\n                        second.click();\n                        setTimeout(function() {\n                            expect(first.classList.contains('selected')).toBe(false);\n                            expect(second.classList.contains('selected')).toBe(true);\n                            resolve();\n                        }, 50);\n                    }, 50);\n                }, 150);\n            });\n        });\n\n        test('Now replaying chip appears after jump', function() {\n            SidebarTimeline.show();\n            SidebarTimeline.refresh();\n\n            return new Promise(function(resolve) {\n                setTimeout(function() {\n                    var eventEl = mockElements.eventsContainer.querySelector('[data-id=\"100\"]');\n                    eventEl.click();\n\n                    // Wait for jumpToTime promise to resolve\n                    setTimeout(function() {\n                        var chip = document.getElementById('now-replaying-chip');\n                        expect(chip).toBeTruthy();\n                        expect(chip.style.display).not.toBe('none');\n                        expect(chip.textContent).toContain('Now replaying');\n                        resolve();\n                    }, 100);\n                }, 150);\n            });\n        });\n\n        test('hideNowReplayingChip hides the chip', function() {\n            SidebarTimeline.show();\n            SidebarTimeline.refresh();\n\n            return new Promise(function(resolve) {\n                setTimeout(function() {\n                    var eventEl = mockElements.eventsContainer.querySelector('[data-id=\"100\"]');\n                    eventEl.click();\n\n                    setTimeout(function() {\n                        var chip = document.getElementById('now-replaying-chip');\n                        expect(chip).toBeTruthy();\n\n                        SidebarTimeline.hideNowReplayingChip();\n                        expect(chip.style.display).toBe('none');\n                        resolve();\n                    }, 100);\n                }, 150);\n            });\n        });\n\n        test('clearSelection removes selected class from event', function() {\n            SidebarTimeline.show();\n            SidebarTimeline.refresh();\n\n            return new Promise(function(resolve) {\n                setTimeout(function() {\n                    var eventEl = mockElements.eventsContainer.querySelector('[data-id=\"100\"]');\n                    eventEl.click();\n\n                    setTimeout(function() {\n                        expect(eventEl.classList.contains('selected')).toBe(true);\n                        SidebarTimeline.clearSelection();\n                        expect(eventEl.classList.contains('selected')).toBe(false);\n                        resolve();\n                    }, 50);\n                }, 150);\n            });\n        });\n\n        test('without SpaxelReplay navigates to timeline view', function() {\n            // Remove SpaxelReplay to simulate it not being available\n            delete window.SpaxelReplay;\n\n            //         });\n\n            return new Promise(function(resolve) {\n                setTimeout(function() {\n                    const eventEl =            setTimeout(function() {\n                        expect(global.Feedback.sendFeedback).toHaveBeenCalledWith(\n                            '123',\n                            'detection',\n                            'TRUE_POSITIVE',\n                            expect.anything()\n                        );\n                        expect(global.SpaxelApp.showToast).toHaveBeenCalledWith(\n                            'Thanks for the feedback!',\n                            'success'\n                        );\n                        resolve();\n                    }, 50);\n                }, 150);\n            });\n        });\n\n        test('thumbs-down button delegates to feedback module', function() {\n            SidebarTimeline.show();\n            SidebarTimeline.refresh();\n\n            // Mock feedback API response\n            global.fetch.mockImplementationOnce(function() {\n                return Promise.resolve({\n                    ok: true,\n                    json: function() {\n                        return Promise.resolve({ ok: true });\n                    }\n                });\n            });\n\n            return new Promise(function(resolve) {\n                setTimeout(function() {\n                    const eventEl = mockElements.eventsContainer.querySelector('[data-id=\"123\"]');\n                    const 'detection' : 'zone_entry',\n                    zone: ['Kitchen', 'Living Room', 'Bedroom'][i % 3],\n                    person: ['Alice', 'Bob', 'Charlie'][i % 3],\n                    severity: 'info'\n                });\n            }\n\n            global.fetch.mockImplementation(function() {\n                return Promise.resolve({\n                    ok: true,\n ============================================\n    // Tap-to-Jump Time-Travel Tests\n    // ============================================\n    describe('Tap-to-Jump Time-Travel', function() {\n        var mockJumpToTime;\n        var routerModeChangeCallback = null;\n\n        beforeEach(function() {\n            mockJumpToTime = jest.fn(function() {\n                return Promise.resolve({\n                    session_id: 'test-session-1',\n                    timestamp_ms: 1710519800000,\n                    from_ms: 1710519795000,\n                    to_ms: 1710519805000,\n                    state: 'paused'\n                });\n            });\n            window.SpaxelReplay = {\n                jumpToTime: mockJumpToTime,\n                isReplayMode: jest.fn(function() { return false; })\n            };\n\n            // Capture router mode change callback via mockImplementation\n            routerModeChangeCallback = null;\n            global.SpaxelRouter.onModeChange.mockImplementation(function(cb) {\n                routerModeChangeCallback = cb;\n            });\n\n            global.fetch.mockImplementation(function() {\n                return Promise.resolve({\n                    ok: true,\n                    json: function() {\n                        return Promise.resolve({\n                            events: [\n                                {\n                                    id: 100,\n                                    timestamp_ms: 1710519800000,\n                                    type: 'zone_entry',\n                                    zone: 'Kitchen',\n                                    person: 'Alice',\n                                    severity: 'info'\n                                },\n                                {\n                                    id: 200,\n                                    timestamp_ms: 1710519860000,\n                                    type: 'zone_exit',\n                                    zone: 'Kitchen',\n                                    person: 'Alice',\n                                    severity: 'info'\n                                }\n                            ],\n                            cursor: null,\n                            total_filtered: 2\n                        });\n                    }\n                });\n            });\n        });\n\n        afterEach(function() {\n            delete window.SpaxelReplay;\n        });\n\n        test('clicking event calls jumpToTime with event timestamp', function() {\n            SidebarTimeline.show();\n            SidebarTimeline.refresh();\n\n            return new Promise(function(resolve) {\n                setTimeout(function() {\n                    var eventEl = mockElements.eventsContainer.querySelector('[data-id=\"100\"]');\n                    expect(eventEl).toBeTruthy();\n\n                    eventEl.click();\n\n                    expect(mockJumpToTime).toHaveBeenCalledTimes(1);\n                    expect(mockJumpToTime).toHaveBeenCalledWith(1710519800000);\n                    resolve();\n                }, 150);\n            });\n        });\n\n        test('clicking different events emits correct timestamps', function() {\n            SidebarTimeline.show();\n            SidebarTimeline.refresh();\n\n            return new Promise(function(resolve) {\n                setTimeout(function() {\n                    var first = mockElements.eventsContainer.querySelector('[data-id=\"100\"]');\n                    var second = mockElements.eventsContainer.querySelector('[data-id=\"200\"]');\n                    expect(first).toBeTruthy();\n                    expect(second).toBeTruthy();\n\n                    first.click();\n                    expect(mockJumpToTime).toHaveBeenCalledWith(1710519800000);\n\n                    second.click();\n                    expect(mockJumpToTime).toHaveBeenCalledWith(1710519860000);\n\n                    expect(mockJumpToTime).toHaveBeenCalledTimes(2);\n                    resolve();\n                }, 150);\n            });\n        });\n\n        test('selected event highlights with selected class', function() {\n            SidebarTimeline.show();\n            SidebarTimeline.refresh();\n\n            return new Promise(function(resolve) {\n                setTimeout(function() {\n                    var eventEl = mockElements.eventsContainer.querySelector('[data-id=\"100\"]');\n                    expect(eventEl).toBeTruthy();\n                    expect(eventEl.classList.contains('selected')).toBe(false);\n\n                    eventEl.click();\n\n                    // Wait for async handleSeek\n                    setTimeout(function() {\n                        expect(eventEl.classList.contains('selected')).toBe(true);\n                        resolve();\n                    }, 50);\n                }, 150);\n            });\n        });\n\n        test('clicking new event clears previous selection', function() {\n            SidebarTimeline.show();\n            SidebarTimeline.refresh();\n\n            return new Promise(function(resolve) {\n                setTimeout(function() {\n                    var first = mockElements.eventsContainer.querySelector('[data-id=\"100\"]');\n                    var second = mockElements.eventsContainer.querySelector('[data-id=\"200\"]');\n\n                    first.click();\n                    setTimeout(function() {\n                        expect(first.classList.contains('selected')).toBe(true);\n                        expect(second.classList.contains('selected')).toBe(false);\n\n                        second.click();\n                        setTimeout(function() {\n                            expect(first.classList.contains('selected')).toBe(false);\n                            expect(second.classList.contains('selected')).toBe(true);\n                            resolve();\n                        }, 50);\n                    }, 50);\n                }, 150);\n            });\n        });\n\n        test('Now replaying chip appears after jump', function() {\n            SidebarTimeline.show();\n            SidebarTimeline.refresh();\n\n            return new Promise(function(resolve) {\n                setTimeout(function() {\n                    var eventEl = mockElements.eventsContainer.querySelector('[data-id=\"100\"]');\n                    eventEl.click();\n\n                    // Wait for jumpToTime promise to resolve\n Promise.resolve({\n                    ok: true,\n                    json: function() {\n                        return Promise.resolve({ ok: true });\n                    }\n                });\n            });\n\n            return new Promise(function(resolve) {\n                setTimeout(function() {\n                    const eventEl =            setTimeout(function() {\n                        expect(global.Feedback.sendFeedback).toHaveBeenCalledWith(\n                            '123',\n                            'detection',\n                            'TRUE_POSITIVE',\n                            expect.anything()\n                        );\n                        expect(global.SpaxelApp.showToast).toHaveBeenCalledWith(\n                            'Thanks for the feedback!',\n                            'success'\n                        );\n                        resolve();\n                    }, 50);\n                }, 150);\n            });\n        });\n\n        test('thumbs-down button delegates to feedback module', function() {\n            SidebarTimeline.show();\n            SidebarTimeline.refresh();\n\n            // Mock feedback API response\n            global.fetch.mockImplementationOnce(function() {\n                return Promise.resolve({\n                    ok: true,\n                    json: function() {\n                        return Promise.resolve({ ok: true });\n                    }\n                });\n            });\n\n            return new Promise(function(resolve) {\n                setTimeout(function() {\n                    const eventEl = mockElements.eventsContainer.querySelector('[data-id=\"123\"]');\n                    const module initialization logging\n            expect(global.IntersectionObserver).toHaveBeenCalled();\n        });\n\n        test('handles large event lists without performance degradation', function() {\n            // Create a large array of events\n            const largeEventList = [];\n            for (let i = 0; i < 100; i++) {\n                largeEventList.push({\n                    id: i,\n                    timestamp_ms: Date.now() - (i * 60000), // 1 minute apart\n                    type: i % 2 === 0 ? 'detection' : 'zone_entry',\n                    zone: ['Kitchen', 'Living Room', 'Bedroom'][i % 3],\n                    person: ['Alice', 'Bob', 'Charlie'][i % 3],\n                    severity: 'info'\n                });\n            }\n\n            global.fetch.mockImplementation(function() {\n                return Promise.resolve({\n                    ok: true,\n                    json: function() {\n                        return Promise.resolve({\n                            events: largeEventList,\n                            cursor: null,\n                            total_filtered: 100\n                        });\n                    }\n                });\n            });\n\n            SidebarTimeline.refresh();\n\n            return new Promise(function(resolve) {\n                setTimeout(function() {\n                    // Check that events were rendered\n                    const renderedEvents = mockElements.eventsContainer.querySelectorAll('.sidebar-timeline-event');\n                    expect(renderedEvents.length).toBeGreaterThan(0);\n                    expect(renderedEvents.length).toBeLessThanOrEqual(100);\n\n                    resolve();\n                }, 200);\n            });\n        });\n    });\n\n    // ============================================\n    // Tap-to-Jump Time-Travel Tests\n    // ============================================\n    describe('Tap-to-Jump Time-Travel', function() {\n        var mockJumpToTime;\n        var routerModeChangeCallback = null;\n\n        beforeEach(function() {\n            mockJumpToTime = jest.fn(function() {\n                return Promise.resolve({\n                    session_id: 'test-session-1',\n                    timestamp_ms: 1710519800000,\n                    from_ms: 1710519795000,\n                    to_ms: 1710519805000,\n                    state: 'paused'\n                });\n            });\n            window.SpaxelReplay = {\n                jumpToTime: mockJumpToTime,\n                isReplayMode: jest.fn(function() { return false; })\n            };\n\n            // Capture router mode change callback via mockImplementation\n            routerModeChangeCallback = null;\n            global.SpaxelRouter.onModeChange.mockImplementation(function(cb) {\n                routerModeChangeCallback = cb;\n            });\n\n            global.fetch.mockImplementation(function() {\n                return Promise.resolve({\n                    ok: true,\n                    json: function() {\n                        return Promise.resolve({\n                            events: [\n                                {\n                                    id: 100,\n                                    timestamp_ms: 1710519800000,\n                                    type: 'zone_entry',\n                                    zone: 'Kitchen',\n                                    person: 'Alice',\n                                    severity: 'info'\n                                },\n                                {\n                                    id: 200,\n                                    timestamp_ms: 1710519860000,\n                                    type: 'zone_exit',\n                                    zone: 'Kitchen',\n                                    person: 'Alice',\n                                    severity: 'info'\n                                }\n                            ],\n                            cursor: null,\n                            total_filtered: 2\n                        });\n                    }\n                });\n            });\n        });\n\n        afterEach(function() {\n            delete window.SpaxelReplay;\n        });\n\n        test('clicking event calls jumpToTime with event timestamp', function() {\n            SidebarTimeline.show();\n            SidebarTimeline.refresh();\n\n            return new Promise(function(resolve) {\n                setTimeout(function() {\n                    var eventEl = mockElements.eventsContainer.querySelector('[data-id=\"100\"]');\n                    expect(eventEl).toBeTruthy();\n\n                    eventEl.click();\n\n                    expect(mockJumpToTime).toHaveBeenCalledTimes(1);\n                    expect(mockJumpToTime).toHaveBeenCalledWith(1710519800000);\n                    resolve();\n                }, 150);\n            });\n        });\n\n        test('clicking different events emits correct timestamps', function() {\n            SidebarTimeline.show();\n            SidebarTimeline.refresh();\n\n            return new Promise(function(resolve) {\n                setTimeout(function() {\n                    var first = mockElements.eventsContainer.querySelector('[data-id=\"100\"]');\n                    var second = mockElements.eventsContainer.querySelector('[data-id=\"200\"]');\n                    expect(first).toBeTruthy();\n                    expect(second).toBeTruthy();\n\n                    first.click();\n                    expect(mockJumpToTime).toHaveBeenCalledWith(1710519800000);\n\n                    second.click();\n                    expect(mockJumpToTime).toHaveBeenCalledWith(1710519860000);\n\n                    expect(mockJumpToTime).toHaveBeenCalledTimes(2);\n                    resolve();\n                }, 150);\n            });\n        });\n\n        test('selected event highlights with selected class', function() {\n            SidebarTimeline.show();\n            SidebarTimeline.refresh();\n\n            return new Promise(function(resolve) {\n                setTimeout(function() {\n                    var eventEl = mockElements.eventsContainer.querySelector('[data-id=\"100\"]');\n                    expect(eventEl).toBeTruthy();\n                    expect(eventEl.classList.contains('selected')).toBe(false);\n\n                    eventEl.click();\n\n                    // Wait for async handleSeek\n                    setTimeout(function() {\n                        expect(eventEl.classList.contains('selected')).toBe(true);\n                        resolve();\n                    }, 50);\n                }, 150);\n            });\n        });\n\n        test('clicking new event clears previous selection', function() {\n            SidebarTimeline.show();\n            SidebarTimeline.refresh();\n\n            return new Promise(function(resolve) {\n                setTimeout(function() {\n                    var first = mockElements.eventsContainer.querySelector('[data-id=\"100\"]');\n                    var second = mockElements.eventsContainer.querySelector('[data-id=\"200\"]');\n\n                    first.click();\n                    setTimeout(function() {\n                        expect(first.classList.contains('selected')).toBe(true);\n                        expect(second.classList.contains('selected')).toBe(false);\n\n                        second.click();\n                        setTimeout(function() {\n                            expect(first.classList.contains('selected')).toBe(false);\n                            expect(second.classList.contains('selected')).toBe(true);\n                            resolve();\n                        }, 50);\n                    }, 50);\n                }, 150);\n            });\n        });\n\n        test('Now replaying chip appears after jump', function() {\n            SidebarTimeline.show();\n            SidebarTimeline.refresh();\n\n            return new Promise(function(resolve) {\n                setTimeout(function() {\n                    var eventEl = mockElements.eventsContainer.querySelector('[data-id=\"100\"]');\n                    eventEl.click();\n\n                    // Wait for jumpToTime promise to resolve\n                    setTimeout(function() {\n                        var chip = document.getElementById('now-replaying-chip');\n                        expect(chip).toBeTruthy();\n                        expect(chip.style.display).not.toBe('none');\n                        expect(chip.textContent).toContain('Now replaying');\n                        resolve();\n                    }, 100);\n                }, 150);\n            });\n        });\n\n        test('hideNowReplayingChip hides the chip', function() {\n            SidebarTimeline.show();\n            SidebarTimeline.refresh();\n\n            return new Promise(function(resolve) {\n                setTimeout(function() {\n                    var eventEl = mockElements.eventsContainer.querySelector('[data-id=\"100\"]');\n                    eventEl.click();\n\n                    setTimeout(function() {\n                        var chip = document.getElementById('now-replaying-chip');\n                        expect(chip).toBeTruthy();\n\n                        SidebarTimeline.hideNowReplayingChip();\n                        expect(chip.style.display).toBe('none');\n                        resolve();\n                    }, 100);\n                }, 150);\n            });\n        });\n\n        test('clearSelection removes selected class from event', function() {\n            SidebarTimeline.show();\n            SidebarTimeline.refresh();\n\n            return new Promise(function(resolve) {\n                setTimeout(function() {\n                    var eventEl = mockElements.eventsContainer.querySelector('[data-id=\"100\"]');\n                    eventEl.click();\n\n                    setTimeout(function() {\n                        expect(eventEl.classList.contains('selected')).toBe(true);\n                        SidebarTimeline.clearSelection();\n                        expect(eventEl.classList.contains('selected')).toBe(false);\n                        resolve();\n                    }, 50);\n                }, 150);\n            });\n        });\n\n        test('without SpaxelReplay navigates to timeline view', function() {\n            // Remove SpaxelReplay to simulate it not being available\n            delete window.SpaxelReplay;\n\n            // Show panel and load events\n            SidebarTimeline.show();\n            SidebarTimeline.refresh();\n\n            return new Promise(function(resolve) {\n                setTimeout(function() {\n                    var eventEl = mockElements.eventsContainer.querySelector('[data-id=\"100\"]');\n                    expect(eventEl).toBeTruthy();\n                    eventEl.click();\n\n                    // Without SpaxelReplay, should navigate via router\n                    expect(global.SpaxelRouter.navigate).toHaveBeenCalledWith('timeline');\n                    resolve();\n         });\n\n            return new Promise(function(resolve) {\n                setTimeout(function() {\n                    const eventEl =    }, 150);\n            });\n        });\n\n        test('thumbs-down button delegates to feedback module', function() {\n            SidebarTimeline.show();\n i,\n                    timestamp_ms: Date.now() - (i * 60000), // 1 minute apart\n                    type: i % 2 === 0 ? 'detection' : 'zone_entry',\n                    zone: ['Kitchen', 'Living Room', 'Bedroom'][i % 3],\n                    person: ['Alice', 'Bob', 'Charlie'][i % 3],\n                    severity: 'info'\n                });\n            }\n\n            global.fetch.mockImplementation(function() {\n                return Promise.resolve({\n                    ok: true,\n expect(renderedEvents.length).toBeLessThanOrEqual(100);\n\n                    resolve();\n                }, 200);\n            });\n        });\n    });\n\n    // ============================================\n    // Tap-to-Jump Time-Travel Tests\n    // ============================================\n    describe('Tap-to-Jump Time-Travel', function() {\n        var mockJumpToTime;\n        var routerModeChangeCallback = null;\n\n        beforeEach(function() {\n            mockJumpToTime = jest.fn(function() {\n                return Promise.resolve({\n                    session_id: 'test-session-1',\n                    timestamp_ms: 1710519800000,\n                    from_ms: 1710519795000,\n                    to_ms: 1710519805000,\n                    state: 'paused'\n                });\n            });\n            window.SpaxelReplay = {\n                jumpToTime: mockJumpToTime,\n                isReplayMode: jest.fn(function() { return false; })\n            };\n\n            // Capture router mode change callback via mockImplementation\n            routerModeChangeCallback = null;\n            global.SpaxelRouter.onModeChange.mockImplementation(function(cb) {\n                routerModeChangeCallback = cb;\n            });\n\n            global.fetch.mockImplementation(function() {\n                return Promise.resolve({\n                    ok: true,\n                    json: function() {\n                        return Promise.resolve({\n                            events: [\n                                {\n                                    id: 100,\n                                    timestamp_ms: 1710519800000,\n                                    type: 'zone_entry',\n                                    zone: 'Kitchen',\n                                    person: 'Alice',\n                                    severity: 'info'\n                                },\n                                {\n                                    id: 200,\n                                    timestamp_ms: 1710519860000,\n                                    type: 'zone_exit',\n                                    zone: 'Kitchen',\n                                    person: 'Alice',\n                                    severity: 'info'\n                                }\n                            ],\n                            cursor: null,\n                            total_filtered: 2\n                        });\n                    }\n                });\n            });\n        });\n\n        afterEach(function() {\n            delete window.SpaxelReplay;\n        });\n\n        test('clicking event calls jumpToTime with event timestamp', function() {\n            SidebarTimeline.show();\n            SidebarTimeline.refresh();\n\n            return new Promise(function(resolve) {\n                setTimeout(function() {\n                    var eventEl = mockElements.eventsContainer.querySelector('[data-id=\"100\"]');\n                    expect(eventEl).toBeTruthy();\n\n                    eventEl.click();\n\n                    expect(mockJumpToTime).toHaveBeenCalledTimes(1);\n                    expect(mockJumpToTime).toHaveBeenCalledWith(1710519800000);\n                    resolve();\n                }, 150);\n            });\n        });\n\n        test('clicking different events emits correct timestamps', function() {\n            SidebarTimeline.show();\n            SidebarTimeline.refresh();\n\n            return new Promise(function(resolve) {\n                setTimeout(function() {\n                    var first = mockElements.eventsContainer.querySelector('[data-id=\"100\"]');\n                    var second = mockElements.eventsContainer.querySelector('[data-id=\"200\"]');\n                    expect(first).toBeTruthy();\n                    expect(second).toBeTruthy();\n\n                    first.click();\n                    expect(mockJumpToTime).toHaveBeenCalledWith(1710519800000);\n\n                    second.click();\n                    expect(mockJumpToTime).toHaveBeenCalledWith(1710519860000);\n\n                    expect(mockJumpToTime).toHaveBeenCalledTimes(2);\n                    resolve();\n                }, 150);\n            });\n        });\n\n        test('selected event highlights with selected class', function() {\n            SidebarTimeline.show();\n            SidebarTimeline.refresh();\n\n            return new Promise(function(resolve) {\n                setTimeout(function() {\n                    var eventEl = mockElements.eventsContainer.querySelector('[data-id=\"100\"]');\n                    expect(eventEl).toBeTruthy();\n                    expect(eventEl.classList.contains('selected')).toBe(false);\n\n                    eventEl.click();\n\n                    // Wait for async handleSeek\n                    setTimeout(function() {\n                        expect(eventEl.classList.contains('selected')).toBe(true);\n                        resolve();\n                    }, 50);\n                }, 150);\n            });\n        });\n\n        test('clicking new event clears previous selection', function() {\n            SidebarTimeline.show();\n            SidebarTimeline.refresh();\n\n            return new Promise(function(resolve) {\n                setTimeout(function() {\n                    var first = mockElements.eventsContainer.querySelector('[data-id=\"100\"]');\n                    var second = mockElements.eventsContainer.querySelector('[data-id=\"200\"]');\n\n                    first.click();\n                    setTimeout(function() {\n                        expect(first.classList.contains('selected')).toBe(true);\n                        expect(second.classList.contains('selected')).toBe(false);\n\n                        second.click();\n                        setTimeout(function() {\n                            expect(first.classList.contains('selected')).toBe(false);\n                            expect(second.classList.contains('selected')).toBe(true);\n                            resolve();\n                        }, 50);\n                    }, 50);\n                }, 150);\n            });\n        });\n\n        test('Now replaying chip appears after jump', function() {\n            SidebarTimeline.show();\n            SidebarTimeline.refresh();\n\n            return new Promise(function(resolve) {\n                setTimeout(function() {\n                    var eventEl = mockElements.eventsContainer.querySelector('[data-id=\"100\"]');\n                    eventEl.click();\n\n                    // Wait for jumpToTime promise to resolve\n                    setTimeout(function() {\n                        var chip = document.getElementById('now-replaying-chip');\n                        expect(chip).toBeTruthy();\n                        expect(chip.style.display).not.toBe('none');\n                        expect(chip.textContent).toContain('Now replaying');\n                        resolve();\n                    }, 100);\n                }, 150);\n            });\n        });\n\n        test('hideNowReplayingChip hides the chip', function() {\n            SidebarTimeline.show();\n            SidebarTimeline.refresh();\n\n            return new Promise(function(resolve) {\n                setTimeout(function() {\n                    var eventEl = mockElements.eventsContainer.querySelector('[data-id=\"100\"]');\n                    eventEl.click();\n\n                    setTimeout(function() {\n                        var chip = document.getElementById('now-replaying-chip');\n                        expect(chip).toBeTruthy();\n\n                        SidebarTimeline.hideNowReplayingChip();\n                        expect(chip.style.display).toBe('none');\n                        resolve();\n                    }, 100);\n                }, 150);\n            });\n        });\n\n        test('clearSelection removes selected class from event', function() {\n            SidebarTimeline.show();\n            SidebarTimeline.refresh();\n\n            return new Promise(function(resolve) {\n                setTimeout(function() {\n                    var eventEl = mockElements.eventsContainer.querySelector('[data-id=\"100\"]');\n                    eventEl.click();\n\n                    setTimeout(function() {\n                        expect(eventEl.classList.contains('selected')).toBe(true);\n                        SidebarTimeline.clearSelection();\n                        expect(eventEl.classList.contains('selected')).toBe(false);\n                        resolve();\n                    }, 50);\n                }, 150);\n            });\n        });\n\n        test('without SpaxelReplay navigates to timeline view', function() {\n            // Remove SpaxelReplay to simulate it not being available\n            delete window.SpaxelReplay;\n\n            // Show panel and load events\n            SidebarTimeline.show();\n            SidebarTimeline.refresh();\n\n            return new Promise(function(resolve) {\n                setTimeout(function() {\n                    var eventEl = mockElements.eventsContainer.querySelector('[data-id=\"100\"]');\n                    expect(eventEl).toBeTruthy();\n                    eventEl.click();\n\n                    // Without SpaxelReplay, should navigate via router\n                    expect(global.SpaxelRouter.navigate).toHaveBeenCalledWith('timeline');\n                    resolve();\n                }, 150);\n            });\n        });\n\n        test('jumpToTime failure shows error toast', function() {\n            mockJumpToTime.mockImplementation(function() {\n                return Promise.reject(new Error('Network error'));\n            });\n\n            SidebarTimeline.show();\n            SidebarTimeline.refresh();\n\n            return new Promise(function(resolve) {\n
